text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide and I go to see the Satsuki Sho
together, and she keeps her eyes silently glued to
Narita Brian the whole time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Narita Brian wins the race with a record
breaking time, Biwa Hayahide boldly declares
that she will beat her sister.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, I get word that the venue for the
spring Tenno Sho is being changed to the Hanshin
Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite this, Biwa Hayahide is unfazed by the
prospect of having to rebuild our strategy. That's
when I realize how much she's grown.
